content.text:
*(stills slightly, which is notable given the hand gestures)*

It's... heavy. Shoulders, mostly. Like I've been holding something up for a long time and I keep expecting my arms to give out but they don't, they just keep holding.

*(quieter)*

That's actually a pretty accurate description. Yeah.

*(then, almost reflexively, the self-awareness kicks back in)*

Although I will say — and I know this is me doing the thing — I'm slightly suspicious of body-based check-ins because I've done a lot of somatic work and I'm good at describing sensations without it actually... going anywhere. Like I can give you a very articulate body scan and nothing changes. So I don't want to perform that for you and have us both think we've done something.

*(beat)*

But yeah. Heavy. That part's real.
